faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to common questions about Thulo Bazaar
faq.cantFindAnswer: Can't find the answer you're looking for? We're here to help.
faq.generalA1: Thulo Bazaar is Nepal's leading online classifieds marketplace where you can buy, sell, and rent products and services across the country.
faq.generalQ2: How do I create an account?
faq.generalA2: Click on Sign Up at the top of the page. Register using your email address or phone number. You'll receive a verification code to confirm your account.
faq.generalQ3: Is Thulo Bazaar free to use?
faq.generalA3: Yes! Creating an account, browsing and posting basic ads is completely free. We offer optional premium features for more visibility.
faq.buyingQ1: How do I contact a seller?
faq.buyingA1: Click on any ad to view details, then use the Message button to contact the seller through our platform, or use the displayed phone number.
faq.buyingQ2: Is it safe to buy on Thulo Bazaar?
faq.buyingA2: We recommend meeting sellers in public places, inspecting items before payment, and using secure payment methods. Look for verified sellers for added trust.
faq.buyingA3: Yes, most sellers are open to negotiation. Use the messaging feature to discuss price and terms.
faq.sellingQ1: How do I post an ad?
faq.sellingA1: Click Post Free Ad, select a category, fill in the details including title, description, price, and photos. Your ad will be reviewed and published.
faq.sellingQ2: How many photos can I upload?
faq.sellingA2: You can upload up to 10 photos per ad. We recommend using high-quality images that clearly show your item from multiple angles.
faq.sellingQ3: How long do ads stay active?
faq.sellingA3: Standard ads remain active for 30 days. You can renew your ad before it expires.
faq.sellingA4: Ads may be rejected for inappropriate content, misleading information, wrong category, or violation of posting guidelines. You can edit and resubmit.
faq.paymentsA1: We accept eSewa, Khalti, bank transfers, and other popular payment methods in Nepal.
faq.paymentsA2: Featured Ads appear at the top of search results and category pages with a special highlight, getting significantly more views.
faq.paymentsA3: Refunds are available within 24 hours if your promoted ad hasn't been published yet. Contact support for special cases.
faq.accountQ1: How do I verify my account?
faq.accountA1: Go to your Profile Settings and look for the Verification section. You can verify your phone number, email, or apply for business verification.
faq.accountQ2: How do I reset my password?
faq.accountA2: Click Sign In, then Forgot Password. Enter your email address, and we'll send you a reset link.
faq.accountQ3: How do I delete my account?
faq.accountA3: Go to Profile Settings > Security > Delete Account. Note that this action is permanent and will remove all your ads and data.
faq.safetyQ1: How can I stay safe when meeting buyers/sellers?
faq.safetyA1: Always meet in public places during daylight hours. Bring a friend if possible. Never share personal financial information.
faq.safetyQ2: How do I report a suspicious user?
faq.safetyA2: Click the Report button on any ad page or user profile. Select the reason and provide details. Our team reviews all reports within 24 hours.
faq.safetyQ3: What should I do if I encounter fraud?
faq.safetyA3: Report the user immediately through our platform. If you've lost money, file a police report and contact our support team with all evidence.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to your questions about Thulo Bazaar
help.noResultsFor: We couldn't find any answers matching "{query}"
help.stillNeedHelpDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to help you.
help.gettingStartedDesc: New to Thulo Bazaar? Start here.
help.gettingStartedA1: Thulo Bazaar is Nepal's leading online classifieds marketplace where you can buy, sell, and rent products and services. We connect buyers and sellers across Nepal for electronics, vehicles, property, jobs, and much more.
help.gettingStartedQ2: How do I create an account?
help.gettingStartedA2: Click on "Sign Up" at the top of the page. You can register using your email address or phone number. You'll receive a verification code to confirm your account. Once verified, you can start posting ads and contacting sellers.
help.gettingStartedQ3: Is it free to use Thulo Bazaar?
help.gettingStartedA3: Yes! Creating an account and browsing ads is completely free. Posting basic ads is also free. We offer optional premium features like Featured Ads, Urgent tags, and Sticky posts to help your ads get more visibility.
help.gettingStartedQ4: What can I sell on Thulo Bazaar?
help.gettingStartedA4: You can sell a wide variety of items including electronics, vehicles, property, fashion, home goods, services, and more. However, illegal items, weapons, drugs, and prohibited content are strictly not allowed.
help.postingAdsDesc: Learn how to create effective ads.
help.postingAdsQ1: How do I post an ad?
help.postingAdsA1: Click "Post Free Ad" button, select a category, fill in the details including title, description, price, and photos. Add your contact information and submit. Your ad will be reviewed and published within 24 hours.
help.postingAdsA2: Ads may be rejected for various reasons: inappropriate content, misleading information, wrong category, poor quality images, or violation of our posting guidelines. You'll receive a notification explaining why and can edit and resubmit your ad.
help.postingAdsQ3: How many photos can I upload?
help.postingAdsA3: You can upload up to 10 photos per ad. We recommend using high-quality images that clearly show your item from multiple angles. The first image will be used as the primary thumbnail.
help.postingAdsQ4: How long will my ad stay active?
help.postingAdsA4: Standard ads remain active for 30 days. You can renew your ad before it expires. Premium and Featured ads may have different durations based on the package you choose.
help.postingAdsQ5: Can I edit my ad after posting?
help.postingAdsA5: Yes, you can edit your ad anytime from your Dashboard. Go to "My Ads", find the ad you want to edit, and click "Edit". Some changes may require re-review by our moderation team.
help.buyingDesc: Tips for safe and smart buying.
help.buyingQ1: How do I contact a seller?
help.buyingA1: Click on any ad to view details, then use the "Message" button to send a message to the seller through our platform, or use the displayed phone number to call/message directly.
help.buyingQ2: Is it safe to buy on Thulo Bazaar?
help.buyingA2: We recommend meeting sellers in public places, inspecting items before payment, and using secure payment methods. Look for verified sellers (blue checkmark) for added trust. Never send money without seeing the item.
help.buyingQ3: How do I report a suspicious ad or seller?
help.buyingA3: Click the "Report" button on any ad page or user profile. Select the reason for reporting and provide details. Our moderation team reviews all reports within 24 hours.
help.buyingA4: Yes, most sellers are open to negotiation. Use the messaging feature to discuss price and terms. If the ad shows "Price Negotiable", the seller has indicated they're open to offers.
help.accountQ1: How do I verify my account?
help.accountA1: Go to your Profile Settings and look for the Verification section. You can verify your phone number, email, or apply for business verification. Verified accounts get a badge and appear more trustworthy to buyers.
help.accountQ2: How do I reset my password?
help.accountA2: Click "Sign In", then "Forgot Password". Enter your email address, and we'll send you a reset link. The link expires in 1 hour for security reasons.
help.accountQ3: How do I delete my account?
help.accountA3: Go to Profile Settings > Security > Delete Account. Note that this action is permanent and will remove all your ads and data. Contact support if you need to recover accidentally deleted accounts.
help.accountA4: Business accounts are for registered businesses and dealers. They get additional features like a shop page, business verification badge, priority support, and bulk posting tools. Apply through your account settings.
help.paymentsDesc: Understand our payment and promotion options.
help.paymentsQ1: What payment methods do you accept?
help.paymentsA1: We accept eSewa, Khalti, bank transfers, and other popular payment methods in Nepal. All payments are processed securely through our payment partners.
help.paymentsA2: Featured Ads appear at the top of search results and category pages with a special highlight. They get significantly more views and faster responses. Prices vary by category and duration.
help.paymentsQ3: How do Urgent and Sticky tags work?
help.paymentsA3: Urgent tags add a visible badge to your ad indicating time-sensitivity. Sticky posts keep your ad at the top of the category for the duration you choose. Both help your ad stand out from regular listings.
help.paymentsQ4: Can I get a refund for promotions?
help.paymentsA4: Refunds are available within 24 hours if your promoted ad hasn't been published yet. Once published, promotions are non-refundable. Contact support for special cases.
help.safetyDesc: Stay safe while buying and selling.
help.safetyQ1: How can I stay safe when meeting buyers/sellers?
help.safetyA1: Always meet in public places during daylight hours. Bring a friend if possible. Never share personal financial information. For expensive items, consider meeting at a police station or bank.
help.safetyQ2: What should I do if I encounter fraud?
help.safetyA2: Report the user immediately through our platform. If you've lost money, file a police report. Contact our support team with all evidence (messages, transaction records).
help.safetyQ3: How does Thulo Bazaar protect my data?
help.safetyA3: We use industry-standard encryption and security practices. Your password is hashed and never stored in plain text. We don't share your personal information with third parties without consent.
help.safetyQ4: Why do some users have verification badges?
help.safetyA4: Verification badges indicate the user has verified their identity. Blue checkmarks mean phone/email verified. Green badges indicate verified businesses. These help you identify trustworthy users.

verification.heroSubtitle: Get verified and unlock premium features that help you sell more and build credibility
verification.buildTrustDesc: Verified badge increases buyer confidence by up to 3x
verification.betterRankingsDesc: Verified ads appear higher in search results
verification.premiumFeaturesDesc: Access exclusive tools and seller benefits
verification.individualDesc: Verify identity with government ID for trust & features.
verification.businessDesc: Verify business with official docs for premium access.
verification.freeMonths: Get {months} months free as a new user.
verification.noPhoneAdded: You haven't added a phone number yet.
verification.verifyPhoneMessage: To apply for Individual or Business verification, please verify your phone number first.
verification.freeOfferDesc: As a new user, you're eligible for FREE {months}-month verification. Get verified today at no cost!
verification.faqTimeA: Most verifications are reviewed within 24-48 hours. You'll receive an email notification once your verification is processed.
verification.faqPricingA: Choose from 1, 3, 6, or 12-month plans. Longer durations offer better discounts. New users may be eligible for FREE verification!
verification.faqExpiryA: Your verified badge will be removed, but your shop page and listings remain. You can renew anytime to restore your verified status.
